title: question-tool idle-watchdog pause hook data contract

PauseIdleWatchdogHook.description: Optional method on Tool.Context. An interactive tool calls it to suspend the stream-idle watchdog while awaiting human input.

ResumeFn.description: Closure returned by pauseIdleWatchdog(). Calling it re-arms the idle watchdog from full timeout.

IdleWatchdogState.description: Internal watchdog state in LLM.stream (not serialized; modeled for contract clarity).

fields.paused: boolean (true while an interactive tool holds the pause)
